title: solidago spathulata var. nana
intro: Solidago spathulata var. nana, also known as Dwarf Gray Goldenrod, is a small shrubby perennial plant that belongs to the asteraceae family and is native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting respiratory health. Solidago spathulata var. nana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in salves and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
